summary: Two individuals charged in a multi-year conspiracy to buy and sell stolen Medicare beneficiary information. Kenia Marrero paid Joan Navarro Bruguet, a former employee of a Miami-based regional health care provider network (Provider A), to secretly provide confidential patient information.

actors.description: Joan Navarro Bruguet, former employee of Provider A.
Kenia Marrero, paid for the data.

vectors.description: Insider abuse of access to confidential patient records.

assets.details: Names, Dates of Birth, Medicare BINs

organization: Provider A (Regional Health Care Provider Network)
notes: Conspiracy began around January 2022. Involves the sale of stolen Medicare beneficiary data.
